title: EVgo Inc. Investor Relations, Earnings Summary & Outlook
text: EVgo Inc. demonstrated strong operational and financial performance with record revenue metrics. The company delivered quarterly revenue growth across 2024 and 2025, with Q1 2026 marking record revenue of $110 million. The company's network throughput has continued to expand, reaching record gigawatt-hour volumes each quarter. For the full year 2024, EVgo achieved $256.8 million in revenue, a 60% increase over 2023. For 2025, management guided full-year revenue of $340-380 million with adjusted EBITDA targets of -$5 million to +$10 million. The company's charging network revenues have grown substantially, driven by retail, commercial, and OEM charging segments. Network utilization has improved and customer account growth has been consistent. The company closed significant financing including a $1.25 billion DOE loan guarantee to build approximately 7,500 fast charging stalls over five years. Management expects continued strong growth driven by EV adoption and infrastructure investment.
